headline: Why The Narrative Around DigitalBridge Group (DBRG) Is Shifting As Analyst Views Cool
summary: The fair value estimate for DigitalBridge Group remains at US$16.00, with no change to the modelled price target. That stability aligns with a mixed analyst backdrop, where a Hold initiation and an Underperform downgrade sit alongside a view that the current price is broadly in line with perceived fundamentals. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifting opinions and what they might mean as the analyst story around DigitalBridge Group continues to develop. Stay updated as the...

headline: How The Narrative Is Shifting For Flutter Entertainment (FLUT) After Guidance Reset And Target Cuts
summary: Flutter Entertainment’s fair value estimate has been reduced from US$207.44 to US$197.35, lowering the modeled upside by about 4.9%. That change aligns with more cautious research following weaker Q4 results and lower 2026 guidance. At the same time, analysts continue to discuss long term execution and valuation questions from both bullish and bearish perspectives. Read on to see how these revised targets fit into the evolving story and what to watch as new data emerges. Stay updated as the...
